rpptx 0.1.0

    • Colors, fills & lines

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

rpptx 0.1.0

New features

  • Full read/write support for PowerPoint (.pptx) files.

Presentation

  • pptx_presentation() тАФ open or create a presentation
  • Presentation$save() тАФ save to disk
  • Presentation$slide_width, $slide_height тАФ slide dimensions
  • Presentation$slides, $slide_layouts, $slide_masters тАФ collections
  • Presentation$core_properties тАФ document metadata

Slides

  • Slides$add_slide() тАФ add a new slide from a layout
  • Slides$delete() тАФ remove a slide from the presentation
  • Slides$move() тАФ reorder slides by moving a slide to a target position
  • Slide$shapes тАФ shape collection for a slide
  • Slide$placeholders тАФ placeholder collection
  • Slide$notes_slide тАФ access (or lazily create) the notes slide for a slide
  • Slide$has_notes_slide тАФ TRUE if a notes slide exists for this slide
  • SlideLayout$placeholders, SlideMaster$placeholders тАФ layout/master placeholders
  • Placeholder inheritance: slides inherit position/size from layout from master

Shapes тАФ read

  • All shape types supported: Shape, Picture, GraphicFrame, GroupShape, Connector, SlidePlaceholder, LayoutPlaceholder, MasterPlaceholder
  • Position and size: $left, $top, $width, $height
  • $name, $shape_id, $shape_type, $has_text_frame

Shapes тАФ create

  • slide$shapes$add_shape() тАФ autoshape
  • slide$shapes$add_textbox() тАФ text box
  • slide$shapes$add_picture() тАФ image (PNG, JPEG, etc. via magick)
  • slide$shapes$add_table() тАФ table
  • slide$shapes$add_chart() тАФ chart
  • slide$shapes$add_connector() тАФ connector
  • slide$shapes$add_group_shape() тАФ group existing shapes
  • slide$shapes$build_freeform() тАФ custom-geometry freeform shapes
  • slide$shapes$add_movie() тАФ embed a video file (OOXML dual-relationship pattern)

Text

  • shape$text_frame тАФ TextFrame with $paragraphs, $text, $word_wrap, $vertical_anchor, margins
  • paragraph$runs, paragraph$add_run(), paragraph$alignment
  • run$text, run$font тАФ Font with $bold, $italic, $underline, $size, $name, $color

Tables

  • shape$table тАФ Table with $rows, $columns, $cell(row, col)
  • cell$text, cell$text_frame, cell$fill
  • as.data.frame(table) тАФ extract cell text as a data frame

Charts

  • Supported chart types: column, bar, line, pie, area, scatter (XY), bubble, radar, doughnut, and their variants
  • CategoryChartData, XyChartData, BubbleChartData тАФ data containers
  • Chart proxy: $chart_title, $plots, $series, $legend

Formatting (DML)

  • shape$fill тАФ FillFormat with solid, gradient, pattern, blip, no-fill
  • shape$line тАФ LineFormat with width, dash style
  • ColorFormat, RGBColor тАФ color specification
  • MSO_THEME_COLOR, MSO_FILL, MSO_LINE_DASH_STYLE enumerations

Enumerations

  • MSO_AUTO_SHAPE_TYPE, MSO_SHAPE_TYPE, PP_PLACEHOLDER
  • MSO_CONNECTOR_TYPE, MSO_THEME_COLOR
  • PP_PARAGRAPH_ALIGNMENT / PP_ALIGN, MSO_AUTO_SIZE, MSO_VERTICAL_ANCHOR
  • XL_CHART_TYPE (73 chart types)

Text тАФ auto size

  • text_frame$auto_size тАФ read/write auto-fit behaviour (MSO_AUTO_SIZE constants): NONE (no auto-fit), SHAPE_TO_FIT_TEXT (<a:spAutoFit/>), TEXT_TO_FIT_SHAPE (<a:normAutofit/>)

Units

  • Inches(), Cm(), Pt(), Mm(), Emu(), Centipoints() тАФ length unit constructors

Display

  • print() / format() methods for all major objects: Presentation, Slide, SlideLayout, SlideMaster, shapes, Table, TextFrame

Vignettes

  • vignette("dml") тАФ colors, fills (solid, gradient, pattern), line formatting, shadow

On this page

Developed by Mark Heckmann.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
